docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-26-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-26-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF LEARLINE MARSHALL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JONATHAN PINEDA IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. THE FOLLOWING RELATED CASES ARE HEARD CONSECUTIVELY WITH THIS MATTER: CSM-21-864351 SHARLA FRANKLIN V. JONATHAN PINEDA; CSM-21-864353 TIFFANY VINSON V. JONATHAN PINEDA; CSM-21-864350 - COURTNEY PELLETE V. JONATHAN PINEDA; PLAINTIFF SHARLA FRANKLIN PROVIDES TESTIMONY OF BEHALF OF ALL PARTIES. PLAINTIFF LEARLINE MARSHALL PROVIDES TESTIMONY ON HER OWN BEHALF. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PINEDA, JONATHAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-26-2021 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON AUG-26-2021)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $110.00) SERVED JUN-26-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PINEDA, JONATHAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2021 - CONTINUED PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO ALLOW TO PROVIDE ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO AUG-26-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. COURT DISCLOSURE IS GIVEN. PLAINTIFF COURTNEY PELLETTE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JONATHAN PINEDA IS PRESENT. COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MARSHALL, LEARLINE AS TO DEFENDANT PINEDA, JONATHAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARSHALL, LEARLINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PINEDA, JONATHAN $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,185.00, *SEE ATTACHED MC-025* STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
